name: Lo Mein with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until tender but still firm; 2-3 minutes. Drain, rinse under cold running water and drain again.
2. Toss noodles with sesame oil until well coated.
3. Combine oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and white pepper in a small bowl.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Add ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
6. Add shrimp; stir-fry until pink, about 1 minute.
7. Add sherry and chives; stir-fry until chives begin to wilt, about 15 seconds.
8. Add half of the bean sprouts; stir-fry for 15 seconds.
9. Add remaining bean sprouts; stir-fry for another 15 seconds.
10. Add oyster sauce mixture and noodles. Cook and stir until heated through, about 2 minutes. Serve with chopped green onions.
